title: Amazon S3 Glacier Vault
description: Schema representing an Amazon S3 Glacier vault resource. A vault is a container for storing archives in Amazon S3 Glacier, providing durable and low-cost storage for data archiving and long-term backup.

VaultARN.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the vault.

CreationDate.description: The Universal Coordinated Time (UTC) date when the vault was created.

LastInventoryDate.description: The Universal Coordinated Time (UTC) date when Amazon S3 Glacier completed the last vault inventory.

NumberOfArchives.description: The number of archives in the vault as of the last inventory date.

SizeInBytes.description: Total size, in bytes, of the archives in the vault as of the last inventory date.

Tags.description: The tags that are assigned to the vault.

Policy.description: The vault access policy document in JSON format.

SNSTopic.description: The Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic ARN.

Events.description: A list of one or more events for which Amazon S3 Glacier will send a notification to the specified Amazon SNS topic.
